description: Refinement predicate references external reactive state (§53.11 E-CONTRACT-003). number(>=0 && <=@maxMana) references the reactive variable @maxMana in the predicate. Inline predicates must be STATELESS — they may reference only the incoming value and its properties, not reactive variables / sibling fields / outer bindings. E-CONTRACT-003 fires (the §34 error partition); the developer is steered to a <machine> guard. (E-DG-002 also fires incidentally from the dependency graph; only E-CONTRACT-003 is asserted.)
rationale: §53.3.1/§53.11 a predicate expression may not reference a reactive variable; @maxMana in the predicate -> E-CONTRACT-003 (the stateless-test boundary).
